an9.66:1.1: "Pañcime, bhikkhave, upādānakkhandhā. Katame pañca? Rūpupādānakkhandho, vedanupādānakkhandho, saññupādānakkhandho, saṅkhārupādānakkhandho, viññāṇupādānakkhandho – ime kho, bhikkhave, pañcupādānakkhandhā.
an9.66:1.2:
Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, pañcannaṁ upādānakkhandhānaṁ pahānāya … pe … ime cattāro satipaṭṭhānā bhāvetabbā"ti.
Catutthaṁ.
